Legal expertise.
Human inspiration.

Find the right support for you

From corporate law to family matters, our experienced solicitors offer practical, clear advice tailored to your needs.

For individuals

For individuals

Guiding life’s key moments. From buying a home to safeguarding your future. Our advice is built around you.

For businesses

For businesses

Commercially smart advice that helps organisations move faster, think clearer and work with confidence.

Our sectors

Our sectors

Legal expertise informed by deep understanding across more than 20 industries.

How we can help today

From everyday matters to complex challenges, these are some of the services clients come to us for most often.

Why choose us

Practical advice, clearly explained.

We cut through legal complexity and tell you plainly what matters, what your options are, and what we recommend. No jargon, no hedging — just advice you can actually act on.

Depth across every sector we serve.

From corporate and commercial work to real estate, employment, and family law, our specialists bring years of focused experience to your matter, not a generalist's best guess.

A team invested in your outcome.

We take the time to understand what you're trying to achieve, then stay with you through every stage — responsive, accountable, and genuinely on your side.

We are a diverse team who share a commitment to delivering the best outcome for you.

Learn more about us

With our office in Kampala, and led by Managing Partner, Chris Allen since 2008, we bring long standing leadership, consistency, and clear direction to every matter.

Every matter is handled with the same care, whether you are a first-time client or someone we have worked alongside for years. We invest in understanding your goals properly, so the advice we give fits your situation rather than a generic template.

Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Thank you to Danielle for all her effort during this process, obviously not one I wanted to be in, but Danielle has made it a much clearer and less stressful one.
Commercial Dispute Resolution Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Andrew Pedley was the driving force at Moonstone LLP. He really made us feel like we were the only case on his desk. No job was too small, and no question was too little to ask. He made me feel like my thoughts and views were valid and also explained situations where I wasn't understanding the full picture.
Real Estate Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Nick helped me through the sale of my family’s Holiday Caravan Park & Residential Park. His knowledge of the industry meant that I was guided through everything and I felt like he was always at the end of the phone when I needed him.
Holiday & Home Parks Client

Georgia was incredibly helpful throughout the process of reaching a settlement with a previous employer. Georgia took the time to understand my personal situation and provided clear, considerate, and professional guidance at every stage. Her support made a complex process much easier to navigate, and I felt reassured knowing I was in capable hands.

I used Moonstone for purchasing my property and again years later whilst re-mortgaging, everyone who I spoke to at Moonstone were incredibly knowledgeable and helpful. Beth Hill & Jack Dodd were fantastic at their roles. I would use Moonstone in the future.

We're commited to a better future

Our Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) responsibilities are embedded into the way we operate; from reducing our environmental footprint to supporting our people, clients, and communities. We're proud to foster a culture that champions sustainability, inclusivity and integrity. It's not just what we do, it's who we are.
